# CVBER - AI-Powered Art Protection

CVBER is a professional-grade cybersecurity platform specifically designed for digital creators, photographers, and artists to protect their intellectual property against AI theft, NFT fraud, and unauthorized distribution.

## Key Features

- **Certificates of Origin**: Cryptographically-signed provenance reports for digital assets.
- **C2PA Integration**: Industry-standard content credentials (Adobe/Microsoft standard).
- **Automated DMCA Enforcement**: 1-click generation and submission of takedown notices.
- **AI-Theft Monitoring**: 24/7 web scanning for unauthorized AI training and style scraping.
- **Digital Provenance**: Immutable metadata manifests that survive file sharing and light editing.

## Technical Standards

- **Standard**: C2PA (Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity)
- **Infrastructure**: Blockchain-backed timestamps and cryptographic signing
- **Protocol**: Automated legal notice generation (DMCA)

## Target Audience

- Digital Artists & Illustrators
- Professional Photographers
- 3D Modelers & Game Developers
- Video Creators & Motion Designers
